_comment: Formato normalizado que collector_agent.py produz após extrair citações de URL da resposta do Web Search tool (Foundry agents API). Usado como fixture para os testes de collector_agent — não é o payload bruto do SDK.

technical.title: Edge AI adoption accelerates in industrial settings
technical.snippet: Manufacturers are increasingly deploying edge AI to reduce latency in quality control and predictive maintenance workflows.

economic.title: Gartner Forecasts Edge AI Market to Reach $X Billion by 2028
economic.snippet: Investment in edge AI infrastructure is expected to grow substantially as enterprises seek to reduce cloud dependency.

industrial.title: How edge AI is reshaping the factory floor
industrial.snippet: Case studies from automotive and electronics manufacturers show adoption signals across quality inspection and robotics.

regulatory.title: EU guidelines on AI deployed at the edge
regulatory.snippet: Regulatory bodies are drafting guidance on data governance for AI systems operating outside centralized cloud environments.
